isolation.flowValidatorGuidance: Flow Validator Guidance: test-observability hooks (DEV only)

assertions.title: Setting a manual override propagates to the UI in under 500 ms

steps.expected: Exit code 0 and propagation timings remain <=500 ms across repeats.
steps.observed: EXIT_CODE:0; 3/3 passed; logged propagation elapsed samples (ms): 29.90, 26.60, 26.50 / 29.60, 27.10, 27.30 / 29.90, 27.20, 26.30.

steps.expected: Exit code 0 with matrix-clear behavior tests passing.
steps.observed: EXIT_CODE:0; test file passed; 3/3 tests passed including matrix-wide reset and RuntimeClient.clearPolicyOverrides wrapper delegation.

assertions.title: Concurrent multi-tab policy writes converge without loss

steps.expected: Exit code 0 and LWW convergence in <=2s without row loss.
steps.observed: EXIT_CODE:0; 3/3 passed; logged convergence elapsed samples: A=113/B=113 ms, A=112/B=112 ms, A=113/B=166 ms.

assertions.title: Policy denial round-trip with runtime Allow-Once (M2 + M3)

steps.expected: Exit code 0 and full denial -> allow-once -> retry-success flow passes repeatedly.
steps.observed: EXIT_CODE:0; 3/3 passed; each run validated deny then allow-once retry success and confirmed allow-once did not persist.

summary: Tested 4 assertions in rerun scope via required commands: 4 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked.
